title: Everyone's using it but no one is allowed to talk about it: College Students' Experiences Navigating the Higher Education Environment in a Generative AI World
authors: Yue Fu, Yifan Lin, Yessica Wang, Sarah Tran, Alexis Hiniker
zh_abstract: 访谈显示高校中存在“普遍使用但羞于公开”的AI使用文化，制度与同伴规范对学生行为影响显著。研究呼吁从情境化实践出发重构高校AI治理与学习支持。

title: Relying on LLMs: Student Practices and Instructor Norms are Changing in Computer Science Education
authors: Xinrui Lin, Heyan Huang, Shumin Shi, John Vines
zh_abstract: 该研究揭示编程教育中学生实际用法与教师规范之间的冲突谱系。作者建议在高风险任务设置默认护栏，并在低冲突任务中加入理解检查促进学习。

title: Visual Reasoning Benchmark: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs on Classroom-Authentic Visual Problems from Primary Education
authors: Mohamed Huti, Alasdair Mackintosh, Amy Waldock, Dominic Andrews, Maxime Lelievre, Moritz Boos, Tobias Murray, Paul Atherton, Robin A. A. Ince, Oliver G. B. Garrod
zh_abstract: VRB基于小学真实试题评估多模态模型视觉推理能力，发现模型在旋转、折叠等动态空间任务上存在明显短板。该结果提醒课堂应用需谨慎避免误导性反馈。

title: Misconception Diagnosis From Student-Tutor Dialogue: Generate Retrieve Rerank
authors: Joshua Mitton, Prarthana Bhattacharyya, Digory Smith, Thomas Christie, Ralph Abboud, Simon Woodhead
zh_abstract: 论文提出“生成-检索-重排”误解诊断流程，从真实辅导对话中定位学生错误概念。实验显示相比基线可获得更高相关性与预测质量。

title: ClassAid: A Real-time Instructor-AI-Student Orchestration System for Classroom Programming Activities
authors: Gefei Zhang, Guodao Sun, Meng Xia, Ronghua Liang
zh_abstract: ClassAid通过教师实时切换AI助教模式，在课堂编程活动中实现动态人机协同。实地部署表明教师主导的编排机制有助于平衡个性化支持与教学控制。

title: Letting Tutor Personas Speak Up for LLMs: Learning Steering Vectors from Dialogue via Preference Optimization
authors: Jaewook Lee, Alexander Scarlatos, Simon Woodhead, Andrew Lan
zh_abstract: 研究利用偏好优化学习导师人格的激活方向，实现无需显式提示的人格化教学风格控制。结果在语义对齐和偏好评估上均有提升，并保持较好可解释性。

title: CASTLE: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Student-Tailored Personalized Safety in Large Language Models
authors: Rui Jia, Ruiyi Lan, Fengrui Liu, Zhongxiang Dai, Bo Jiang, Jing Shao, Jingyuan Chen, Guandong Xu, Fei Wu, Min Zhang
zh_abstract: CASTLE从学生属性差异出发评估教育场景个性化安全，覆盖风险识别、情绪共情与学生对齐。实验显示现有模型整体分数偏低，暴露教育安全短板。

title: Towards LLM-Empowered Knowledge Tracing via LLM-Student Hierarchical Behavior Alignment in Hyperbolic Space
authors: Xingcheng Fu, Shengpeng Wang, Yisen Gao, Xianxian Li, Chunpei Li, Qingyun Sun, Dongran Yu
zh_abstract: L-HAKT通过教师代理和学生代理构建分层行为对齐，并在双曲空间刻画知识层级结构。四个真实教育数据集实验验证了其在追踪精度上的有效性。

title: Same Feedback Different Source: How AI vs Human Feedback Shapes Learner Engagement
zh_abstract: 在控制反馈内容一致的条件下，研究发现仅“反馈来源标签”就会显著影响学习者投入度和评价机制。该发现对混合人机教学系统的界面与信任设计有直接意义。

title: EduEVAL-DB: A Role-Based Dataset for Pedagogical Risk Evaluation in Educational Explanations
authors: Javier Irigoyen, Roberto Daza, Aythami Morales, Julian Fierrez, Francisco Jurado, Alvaro Ortigosa, Ruben Tolosana
zh_abstract: EduEVAL-DB提供教师角色驱动的教学风险数据集，覆盖事实性、适龄性、偏见等多维风险标签。该资源有助于训练更可靠的教育解释评测器与辅导模型。

title: Designing AI Tutors for Interest-Based Learning: Insights from Human Instructors
zh_abstract: 该研究从真人导师如何实施兴趣导向教学出发，提炼AI导师设计要点。结论强调兴趣整合不仅是内容映射，更涉及动机维持与互动节奏控制。

link: The Path to Conversational AI Tutors: Integrating Tutoring Best Practices and Targeted Technologies to Produce Scalable AI Agents
code: Kirk Vanacore, Ryan S. Baker, Avery H. Closser, Jeremy Roschelle
column12: 论文提出会话式AI导师的研究路线，主张保留ITS已验证机制并结合生成式能力重构教学交互。作者给出“保留、改变、聚焦、研究”的系统框架。

title: Evidence-Decision-Feedback: Theory-Driven Adaptive Scaffolding for LLM Agents
authors: Clayton Cohn, Siyuan Guo, Surya Rayala, Hanchen David Wang, Naveeduddin Mohammed, Umesh Timalsina, Shruti Jain, Angela Eeds, Menton Deweese, Pamela J. Osborn Popp, Rebekah Stanton, Shakeera Walker, Meiyi Ma, Gautam Biswas
zh_abstract: EDF将证据推断、教学决策与反馈生成组织为统一框架，并在真实课堂中验证了渐进式脚手架与可解释反馈效果。该方法有助于降低过度依赖风险。

title: Instructor-Aligned Knowledge Graphs for Personalized Learning
authors: Abdulrahman AlRabah, Priyanka Kargupta, Jiawei Han, Abdussalam Alawini
zh_abstract: InstructKG从课程材料自动抽取概念与依赖关系，构建与教师教学顺序一致的知识图谱。该方法为大班个性化诊断与干预提供了可扩展结构基础。

title: StoryLensEdu: Personalized Learning Report Generation through Narrative-Driven Multi-Agent Systems
authors: Leixian Shen, Yan Luo, Rui Sheng, Yujia He, Haotian Li, Leni Yang, Huamin Qu
zh_abstract: StoryLensEdu以多智能体将学习分析结果组织为叙事化报告，并支持后续问答解释。用户评估显示该形式可提升学习过程理解与参与度。

title: Arapai: An Offline-First AI Chatbot Architecture for Low-Connectivity Educational Environments
authors: Joseph Walusimbi, Ann Move Oguti, Joshua Benjamin Ssentongo, Keith Ainebyona
zh_abstract: Arapai提出离线优先架构，在低配置CPU设备上实现本地化教育问答与分层教学支持。试点结果验证了其在低连接场景中的可用性与教育价值。

title: ISD-Agent-Bench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating LLM-based Instructional Design Agents
authors: YoungHoon Jeon, Suwan Kim, Haein Son, Sookbun Lee, Yeil Jeong, Unggi Lee
zh_abstract: ISD-Agent-Bench覆盖ADDIE流程下的大规模教学设计场景，并采用多评审模型降低单一评测偏差。实验显示经典教学设计理论与ReAct结合可显著提升智能体质量。

title: How Uncertain Is the Grade? A Benchmark of Uncertainty Metrics for LLM-Based Automatic Assessment
authors: Hang Li, Kaiqi Yang, Xianxuan Long, Fedor Filippov, Yucheng Chu, Yasemin Copur-Gencturk, Peng He, Cory Miller, Namsoo Shin, Joseph Krajcik, Hui Liu, Jiliang Tang
zh_abstract: 该文系统比较LLM自动评分中的不确定性估计方法，分析模型家族、任务类型与解码策略影响。研究为“可信自动评分”提供了不确定性建模基线与实践建议。
